series_metadata.series_title: SOACDF Custodial reports, and Star Fund Reports
series_metadata.series_description: SOACDF Custodial reports; Star Ohio and KeyBank reports specific to Southern Ohio Agricultural and Community Development Foundation cash flow not held in OAKS system.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, or no longer of agency value, then destroy., Paper: Shred
